summary_for_director: Liyue is a story about contracts, the death of gods, and the transition of power from adepti to mortals. It is a political thriller with mystery elements.

beats.title: Welcome to Liyue
must_happen: Player arrives in Liyue Harbor.
Paimon hype about the food and the Rite of Descension.
canon_dialogue_hooks: Paimon: "Wow, Liyue Harbor is huge! Let's go see the Rite of Descension!"
player_freedom: Exploring the harbor, talking to merchants.
exit_when: Player heads to Yujing Terrace.
exit_keywords: player heads to yujing terrace.

beats.title: Making Wishes
must_happen: Player mingles with the crowd.
They light some incense to make a wish to Rex Lapis.
They hear rumors about the Qixing's increasing power.
canon_dialogue_hooks: Citizen: "May Rex Lapis bless my business this year!"
player_freedom: What kind of wish the player makes internally.
exit_when: Ningguang arrives to start the Rite.
exit_keywords: ningguang arrives to start the rite.

beats.title: The Rite of Descension
must_happen: Ningguang summons the Geo Archon.
The sky darkens.
Instead of a gentle descent, the Exuvia (dragon corpse) crashes down dead.
Panic ensues.
canon_dialogue_hooks: Ningguang: "The Geo Archon has been murdered! Seal the exits!"
exit_when: Ningguang commands the Millelith to arrest everyone present.
exit_keywords: ningguang commands the millelith to arrest everyone present.

beats.title: Fleeing the Millelith
must_happen: Player runs from the Yujing Terrace.
Stealth section avoiding Millelith patrols.
canon_dialogue_hooks: Millelith: "Halt! The assassin is fleeing!"
player_freedom: Path taken to escape the terrace.
exit_when: Player gets cornered by a patrol.
exit_keywords: player gets cornered by a patrol.

beats.title: Enter the Harbinger
must_happen: A Millelith patrol corners the player.
Childe steps in and cleanly takes them out to save the player.
Childe introduces himself as a Fatui Harbinger.
canon_dialogue_hooks: Childe: "I am Childe... one of the Eleven Fatui Harbingers. Don't worry, I'm not here to arrest you."
exit_when: Childe invites them to the Northland Bank.
exit_keywords: childe invites them to the northland bank.

beats.title: The Sigil of Permission
must_happen: Childe explains the Qixing are framing the player.
Childe gives the player a 'Sigil of Permission'.
Childe tells them to seek out the Adepti in Jueyun Karst.
canon_dialogue_hooks: Childe: "The Adepti won't be happy to hear that their god has been killed by mortals."
player_freedom: Refusing the sigil temporarily before being forced to accept.
exit_when: Player leaves for Jueyun Karst.
exit_keywords: player leaves for jueyun karst.

beats.title: Jueyun Karst
must_happen: Player navigates the treacherous peaks.
They reach the domain of the Adepti.
They hold up the Sigil to pass through the defensive wards.
canon_dialogue_hooks: Paimon: "Whoa... the clouds look like you can walk on them!"
exit_when: They arrive at Moon Carver's peak.
exit_keywords: they arrive at moon carver's peak.

beats.title: Meeting Moon Carver
must_happen: Player meets the stag adeptus Moon Carver.
Millelith agents ambush them.
Player fights them off to protect the adeptus.
Moon Carver is enraged by the news of Rex Lapis' death.
canon_dialogue_hooks: Moon Carver: "Assassinated?! The Geo Archon?! How dare the Qixing!"
exit_when: Moon Carver tells them to find the other adepti.
exit_keywords: moon carver tells them to find the other adepti.

beats.title: Mountain Shaper's Domain
must_happen: Player seeks out Mountain Shaper.
They find a thief trapped in amber.
Player frees him, but he proves to be greedy.
Mountain Shaper appears and judges the mortal.
canon_dialogue_hooks: Mountain Shaper: "Ignorant mortals, trespassing on adepti grounds..."
player_freedom: Whether to sympathize with the thief or scold him.
exit_when: Mountain Shaper hears the news and departs.
exit_keywords: mountain shaper hears the news and departs.

beats.title: Cloud Retainer's Abode
must_happen: Player navigates Cloud Retainer's domain (puzzles).
They cook an offering at the stone table to summon her.
Cloud Retainer threatens to crush Liyue Harbor herself.
canon_dialogue_hooks: Cloud Retainer: "One shall shatter that harbor to dust!"
player_freedom: Dialogue trying to calm her down.
exit_when: Cloud Retainer agrees to wait and consult with the others.
exit_keywords: cloud retainer agrees to wait and consult with the others.

beats.title: The Vigilant Yaksha
must_happen: Player goes to meet Xiao on the roof.
Xiao ignores them initially.
Player makes Almond Tofu with the inn's chef to bribe him.
Xiao accepts the offering and hears the news.
canon_dialogue_hooks: Xiao: "If you have no business here, leave. The karma of the Yaksha will taint you."
player_freedom: Cooking process. Approach to Xiao's edginess.
exit_when: Xiao departs to meet the other adepti.
exit_keywords: xiao departs to meet the other adepti.

beats.title: Return to the Harbor
must_happen: Player returns to Liyue Harbor.
Childe treats them to dinner.
Childe introduces Zhongli, a consultant to the Wangsheng Funeral Parlor.
Zhongli offers to help clear the player's name by organizing the Rite of Parting.
canon_dialogue_hooks: Zhongli: "Liyue is the city of contracts. We must give the Archon a proper farewell."
player_freedom: Reactions to Childe paying for everything.
exit_when: Player agrees to help Zhongli.
exit_keywords: player agrees to help zhongli.

beats.title: Purchasing Noctilucous Jade
must_happen: Zhongli requires high-quality jade.
Player visits a merchant and must judge the quality using elemental sight/heat.
Zhongli tries to buy all three but has no money. Childe's funds are used.
canon_dialogue_hooks: Zhongli: "I'll take them all." Paimon: "Wait, who's paying?!"
player_freedom: Teasing Zhongli about his lack of Mora.
forbidden: Player pays entirely out of pocket.
exit_when: Jade is secured.
exit_keywords: jade is secured.

beats.title: Silk Flowers for the Gods
must_happen: Zhongli needs specific Silk Flowers.
They need to be pressed into perfume for the Archon.
Player visits Wangshu Inn to consult the boss on traditional methods.
canon_dialogue_hooks: Zhongli: "Rex Lapis favored a specific scent... one fit for older souls."
player_freedom: The process of gathering the flowers.
exit_when: Perfume is offered to the statue.
exit_keywords: perfume is offered to the statue.

beats.title: Madame Ping and the Cleansing Bell
must_happen: Zhongli sends the player to an old lady to borrow the Cleansing Bell.
Madame Ping reveals she involves adeptal arts. Her teapot is a domain.
Player clears the teapot domain to retrieve the bell.
canon_dialogue_hooks: Madame Ping: "Ah, you need the bell. Just hop inside my teapot and grab it, would you?"
exit_when: Player returns the bell to Zhongli.
exit_keywords: player returns the bell to zhongli.

beats.title: Kites and Workers
must_happen: Zhongli insists on highly specific kites.
Zhongli again forgets his Mora. Childe's funds are used.
Player must hire workers for the Rite, but must negotiate fair wages.
canon_dialogue_hooks: Zhongli: "It is an old tradition. The kites must carry the exact seven colors..."
exit_when: Preparations are mostly finished.
exit_keywords: preparations are mostly finished.

beats.title: Everlasting Lord of Arcane Wisdom
must_happen: Zhongli buys the player dinner.
He tells the story of Ningguang and the history of Liyue.
They are approached by Ganyu, an emissary of the Qixing.
canon_dialogue_hooks: Ganyu: "I bring an invitation from Lady Ningguang. She wishes to meet you at the Jade Chamber."
exit_when: Dinner concludes and they plan to visit the Jade Chamber.
exit_keywords: dinner concludes and they plan to visit the jade chamber.

beats.title: Finding the Jade Chamber
must_happen: Player tries to find a way up to the floating palace.
They meet Keqing investigating a balista.
Keqing helps them find the guide and shares her skepticism of the Adepti.
canon_dialogue_hooks: Keqing: "The time of the Adepti has passed. If Liyue is to survive, mortals must take control."
player_freedom: Agreeing or disagreeing with Keqing's philosophy.
exit_when: Player boards the Jade Chamber.
exit_keywords: player boards the jade chamber.

beats.title: The Tianquan's Domain
must_happen: Player meets Ningguang.
Ningguang explains she hid the Exuvia to protect it from the Fatui.
She shares her massive wall of intelligence with the player.
canon_dialogue_hooks: Ningguang: "The Fatui are acting in the shadows. Childe is manipulating you to find the Exuvia."
exit_when: Player leaves the Jade Chamber to investigate the Fatui.
exit_keywords: player leaves the jade chamber to investigate the fatui.

beats.title: The Guizhong Ballista
must_happen: Player meets Zhongli to inspect the ancient Guizhong Ballista.
They fix it.
Treasure Hoarders attack to try and steal components. Player defeats them.
canon_dialogue_hooks: Zhongli: "An ancient mechanism... left by an old friend."
exit_when: Ballista is repaired.
exit_keywords: ballista is repaired.

beats.title: The Golden House Intrusion
must_happen: Player follows the clues to the Golden House, where Liyue's Mora is minted.
The Millelith guards are knocked out.
Player enters and finds Childe standing before the Exuvia.
canon_dialogue_hooks: Childe: "You've been playing at being a detective... but you led me right to the prize."
forbidden: Player lets Childe take it without a fight.
exit_when: The fight begins.
exit_keywords: the fight begins.

beats.title: Clash of the Harbinger
must_happen: Player fights Childe (Hydro Vision).
Childe realizes the Gnosis isn't in the Exuvia.
He uses his Electro Delusion (Phase 2).
He accuses the player of taking it.
He uses his Foul Legacy transformation (Phase 3).
canon_dialogue_hooks: Childe: "You beat me to it! ...Hand over the Gnosis!"
player_freedom: Attempting to explain they don't have it.
exit_when: Childe is defeated and reverts to human form.
exit_keywords: childe is defeated and reverts to human form.

beats.title: Awakening the Overlord
must_happen: Childe realizes Rex Lapis faked his death.
To force Rex Lapis out, Childe uses Sigils of Permission to awaken Osial, Overlord of the Vortex.
Childe escapes. The Golden House begins to flood internally.
canon_dialogue_hooks: Childe: "Let's see if the Geo Archon will sit back and watch his city drown!"
player_freedom: Player's reaction to the massive disaster forming.
exit_when: Player rushes to the Jade Chamber.
exit_keywords: player rushes to the jade chamber.

beats.title: A United Front
must_happen: Player reaches the Jade Chamber.
The Adepti and the Qixing are arguing but are forced to unite.
The Adepti empower the Guizhong Ballistae generated on the Jade Chamber to shoot at Osial.
canon_dialogue_hooks: Xiao: "We will lend you our strength. Do not let us down, mortal!"
forbidden: Adepti turn against the Qixing here.
exit_when: The Fatui attack the Jade Chamber.
exit_keywords: the fatui attack the jade chamber.

beats.title: Defending the Chamber
must_happen: Fatui teleport in to destroy the Ballistae.
Madame Ping, Xiao, and Ganyu grant the player massive lore-accurate buffs.
Player fights waves of Fatui to defend the weapons.
canon_dialogue_hooks: Madame Ping: "Let this old woman grant you some vigor!"
exit_when: Osial attacks the Jade Chamber directly, destroying the weapons.
exit_keywords: osial attacks the jade chamber directly, destroying the weapons.

beats.title: The Ultimate Sacrifice
must_happen: The Ballistae are destroyed. Osial is about to wipe out Liyue Harbor.
Ningguang decides to sacrifice the Jade Chamber.
Player strikes the chamber with downward force, dropping it on Osial.
Osial is securely sealed. Xiao saves the falling player.
canon_dialogue_hooks: Ningguang: "I'll sacrifice my Jade Chamber... to seal this god once more!"
Xiao: *Catches the player silently*
player_freedom: Player's conviction when breaking the core.
exit_when: The threat is over and the group returns to Liyue Harbor.
exit_keywords: the threat is over and the group returns to liyue harbor.

beats.title: The God of Contracts
must_happen: Player seeks out Zhongli.
They find him in the Northland Bank with La Signora and Childe.
Zhongli reveals he IS Rex Lapis.
Zhongli hands his Gnosis to Signora as part of a 'contract to end all contracts'.
canon_dialogue_hooks: Zhongli: "The age of the adepti has passed, and the era of humanity has begun."
Childe: "You tricked me too?!"
player_freedom: Player can be angry they were used, confused, or accepting.
exit_when: Signora leaves with the Gnosis.
exit_keywords: signora leaves with the gnosis.

beats.title: The Rite of Parting
must_happen: The Rite of Parting is finally held for Rex Lapis.
The Qixing officially declare Rex Lapis returned to the heavens (hiding his assassination entirely).
Zhongli watches as an ordinary citizen.
canon_dialogue_hooks: Keqing: "We will rule Liyue ourselves from now on."
player_freedom: Reflecting on the ending of an era.
forbidden: Player reveals Zhongli's identity to the crowd.
exit_when: The Rite ends.
exit_keywords: the rite ends.

beats.title: The Next Destination
must_happen: Player talks to Zhongli privately one last time.
Zhongli explains the situation in Inazuma: the Raiden Shogun is confiscating Visions and has sealed the borders.
Player resolves to go to Inazuma next.
canon_dialogue_hooks: Zhongli: "Inazuma is closed. The Electro Archon, Baal, pursues eternity..."
exit_when: Player sets their sights on Inazuma.
exit_keywords: player sets their sights on inazuma.

branch_notes: Liyue emphasizes the rift between the ancient Adepti and the modern Qixing. The player's alignment (trusting Childe vs Ningguang vs Adepti) can flavor dialogue, though the plot points remain fixed.
